title: The Weekly Challenge - 374
task1_desc: You are given a string. Write a script to return all possible vowel substrings in the given string. A vowel substring is a substring that only consists of vowels and has all five vowels present in it.
task2_desc: You are given a string containing 0-9 digits only. Write a script to return the largest number with all digits the same in the given string.
